name: Baked Cornish Game Hens
recipeInstructions:
1. Stir 1/2 cup of melted butter with onion, celery, green pepper, mushrooms, garlic, and herbs.
2. Season the hens inside and out with salt and pepper.
3. Stuff each bird with an equal amount of the vegetable mixture.
4. Place the birds in a baking dish, breast side up.
5. Drizzle with the remaining 1/4 cup of butter.
6. Cover and bake for 1-1/2 hours at 325 degrees Fahrenheit.
7. Brown the hens for an additional minute at 500 degrees Fahrenheit before serving.
